package models

import (
    "net/http"

    "acme/project/internal/service"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
    ID   int    `gorm:"column:id" binding:"required" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    Name string `gorm:"column:name" validate:"required"`
}

func (u *User) BeforeCreate(tx *gorm.DB) error {
    _, _ = http.Get("https://example.com")
    _ = gin.H{}
    _ = service.UserService{}
    return nil
}
